MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hjelpeside'

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Lokale forskrifter - Lovdata

https://lovdata.no/register/lokaleForskrifter
Avvik: 86 | Bestått: 118
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (110 characters)

<a href="/dokument/LF/forskrift/2026-02-03-154"> <strong> Forskrift om gebyrer for saksbehandling og kontroll etter forurensningsforskriften, Eidsvoll kommune, Akershus </stro
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (101 characters)

<a href="/dokument/LF/forskrift/2026-02-03-133"> <strong> Forskrift om fiske ved utløp av vassdrag med anadrome laksefisk i Østfold, Buskerud, Oslo og Akershus </strong> </a>
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hjelpeside'

<a aria-label="Gå til hjelpeside" class="open-help-noscript" href="/info/faq"></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="dropdown selector-medium overflow" id="muniselect" name="municipality"> <option value="*">Alle kommuner</option> <option value="Alstahaug">Alstahaug </option> <option value="Alta">Al
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="dropdown selector-medium overflow" id="protAreaselect" name="protectedArea"> <option value="*">Alle verneområder</option> <option value="FUGLEFREDNING">Fuglefredning</option> <option va
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (81 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-expanded="false" class="gliding-menu-item menuTgl">Rettskilder</button>

Tariffavtaler - Lovdata

https://lovdata.no/register/tariffavtaler
Avvik: 84 | Bestått: 127
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hjelpeside'

<a aria-label="Gå til hjelpeside" class="open-help-noscript" href="/info/faq"></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (83 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a class="btn btn-default filter clear-btn" href="/register/tariffavtaler#filterHeader" role="button"> Nullstill filter </a>
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a class="active desc" href="?dir=asc#sortHeader" role="button">Kronologisk<span aria-hidden="true" class="asc">↓</span><span aria-hidden="true" class="desc">↑</span> </a>
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a class="desc" href="?sort=alpha#sortHeader" role="button">Alfabetisk<span aria-hidden="true" class="asc">↓</span><span aria-hidden="true" class="desc">↑</span> </a>
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a href="?offset=20#doclistheader" role="button">Neste side →</a>
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

Forskrift om endring i forskrift om næringsmidler til særskilte grupper - Lovdata

https://lovdata.no/dokument/LTI/forskrift/2026-02-09-193
Avvik: 123 | Bestått: 152
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a aria-label="Skriv ut" class="tooltip-parent" data-placement="bottom" data-toggle="tooltip" href="javascript:print()" role="button" title="Skriv ut"><i aria-hidden="true" class="ss-icon ss-symbolico
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a class="link" href="https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg_impl/2017/2470/oj">http://data.europa.eu/eli/reg_impl/2017/2470/oj</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="btn btn-primary btn-block twitter" href="" role="button" target="_blank">Del på Twitter</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="btn btn-primary btn-block facebook" href="" role="button" target="_blank">Del på Facebook</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="btn btn-primary btn-block linkedin" href="" role="button" target="_blank">Del på LinkedIn</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hjelpeside'

<a aria-label="Gå til hjelpeside" class="open-help-noscript" href="/info/faq"></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
4.1.1 Parsing (17 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Data table has no caption or label

<table class="meta" style="width:100%"><tbody><tr class="odd"><th class="metafieldLabel">Dato</th><td class="metavalue morTableAlignLeft morTableVerticalAlignTop" id="metaField_dato">FOR-2026-02-09-19
Add <caption> element or aria-label to describe the table
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th class="metafieldLabel">Dato</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th class="metafieldLabel">Departement</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th class="metafieldLabel">Ikrafttredelse</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th class="metafieldLabel">Endrer</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers

<th class="metafieldLabel">Hjemmel</th>

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: 'docStatus'

Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-label="Skriv ut" class="tooltip-parent" data-placement="bottom" data-toggle="tooltip" href="javascript:print()" role="button" title="Skriv ut"><i aria-hidden="true" class="ss-icon ss-symbolico
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a class="btn btn-default docView" href="/static/lovtidend/ltavd1/2026/sf-20260209-0193.pdf" role="button" target="blank"><img alt="PDF-ikon" class="freeBtnIcon" src="/resources/images/blue-document-p
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a class="btn btn-default docView" href="/static/lovtidend/ltavd1/2026/sf-20260209-0193.pdf.asc" role="button" target="blank"><img alt="Hengelås-ikon" class="freeBtnIcon" src="/resources/images/lock.p
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a class="btn btn-default docView" href="/xml/LTI/sf-20260209-0193.xml" role="button" target="blank"><img alt="Dokument-ikon" class="freeBtnIcon" src="/resources/images/blue-document-node.png"/>XML-ve
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

Magnus Lagabøtes landslov - Lovdata

https://lovdata.no/info/landslov
Avvik: 83 | Bestått: 82
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hjelpeside'

<a aria-label="Gå til hjelpeside" class="open-help-noscript" href="/info/faq"></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Data table has no caption or label

<table border="0" cellpadding="6" cellspacing="2" width="98%"> <tbody> <tr> <th style="text-align: left;">Dato</th> <th style="text-align: left;">Tittel</th> </tr> <tr> <td>24.06.1274</td> <td><a href
Add <caption> element or aria-label to describe the table
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th style="text-align: left;">Dato</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th style="text-align: left;">Tittel</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (79 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="cookieInfo" href="/info/personvern#cookies"><i class="ss-icon ss-symbolicons-line">🍪</i><span class="cookie-label">Om informasjonskapsler</span></a>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Artikkelarkiv - Lovdata

https://lovdata.no/artikler
Avvik: 86 | Bestått: 99
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://rett24.no/articles/emd-legger-bort-nok-en-barnevernklage-mot-norge" target="_blank">EMD legger bort nok en barnevernklage mot Norge</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://snl.no/folkerett" target="_blank">Folkerett</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hjelpeside'

<a aria-label="Gå til hjelpeside" class="open-help-noscript" href="/info/faq"></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="select2 form-control" id="articleYears" onchange="location = this.options[this.selectedIndex].value;"> <option value="?year=AllYears">Alle år</option> <option selected="selected" value=
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-control filter-sok-input" id="searchfilter" name="searchfilter" placeholder="Søk i Artikler"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="submit" id="searchfilterSubmit" value="Søk"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (79 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-expanded="false" class="gliding-menu-item menuTgl">Rettskilder</button>

Lenker til rettsinformasjon - Lovdata

https://lovdata.no/info/lenker
Avvik: 93 | Bestått: 283
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (193 characters)

<a href="http://www.domstol.no/"><b> Domstoler for øvrig </b> : Opplysninger om domstolene og lenker til domstoler med egne nettsteder hvor du blant annet kan få tilgang til sakslister og eventuelt
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="http://www.admin.ch/ch/d/sr/sr.html" target="_top"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hjelpeside'

<a aria-label="Gå til hjelpeside" class="open-help-noscript" href="/info/faq"></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (102 characters)

<a href="/dokument/SFE/forskrift/2021-08-17-2515"> <strong> Regulation on additional requirements for air transport operations in Svalbard and other polar regions </strong> </
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hjelpeside'

<a aria-label="Gå til hjelpeside" class="open-help-noscript" href="/info/faq"></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a class="btn btn-default filter clear-btn" href="/register/forskrifterEngelsk#filterHeader" role="button"> Nullstill filter </a>
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a class="active desc" href="?dir=asc#sortHeader" role="button">Kronologisk<span aria-hidden="true" class="asc">↓</span><span aria-hidden="true" class="desc">↑</span> </a>
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a class="desc" href="?sort=alpha#sortHeader" role="button">Alfabetisk<span aria-hidden="true" class="asc">↓</span><span aria-hidden="true" class="desc">↑</span> </a>
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a href="?offset=20#doclistheader" role="button">Neste side →</a>
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Redaktøransvar - Lovdata

https://lovdata.no/info/redaktoransvar
Avvik: 81 | Bestått: 66
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://www.lovdata.no/info/kontakt.html">https://www.lovdata.no/info/kontakt.html</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hjelpeside'

<a aria-label="Gå til hjelpeside" class="open-help-noscript" href="/info/faq"></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (79 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

Oversatte lover - Lovdata

https://lovdata.no/register/loverEngelsk
Avvik: 87 | Bestått: 136
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (121 characters)

<a href="/dokument/NLE/lov/2025-05-27-21"> <strong> Act relating to the conservation and sustainable use of marine biological diversity of areas beyond national jurisdiction <
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (127 characters)

<a href="/dokument/NLE/lov/2021-06-18-99"> <strong> Act relating to enterprises' transparency and work on fundamental human rights and decent working conditions (Transparency Act)
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (122 characters)

<a href="/dokument/NLE/lov/2020-05-29-59"> <strong> Act relating to the editorial independence and liability of editor-controlled journalistic media (The Media Liability Act)
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hjelpeside'

<a aria-label="Gå til hjelpeside" class="open-help-noscript" href="/info/faq"></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (83 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a href="?offset=20#doclistheader" role="button">Neste side →</a>
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

Om Lovdata - Lovdata

https://lovdata.no/info/om_lovdata
Avvik: 80 | Bestått: 73
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hjelpeside'

<a aria-label="Gå til hjelpeside" class="open-help-noscript" href="/info/faq"></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (79 avvik)

Oversikt over advokater og rettshjelpere - Lovdata

https://lovdata.no/advokater/
Avvik: 85 | Bestått: 1298
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hjelpeside'

<a aria-label="Gå til hjelpeside" class="open-help-noscript" href="/info/faq"></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'city' missing autocomplete attribute

<select class="dropdown selector-medium overflow" id="placeSelect" name="city"> <option disabled="" hidden="" selected="">Hele landet</option> <option value="Alta">Alta</option> <option value="Arendal
Add autocomplete='address-level2' to help users fill in the form
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (82 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a class="btn btn-default filter clear-btn" href="/advokater#filterHeader" role="button"> Nullstill filter <span class="resetIcon"><i aria-hidde
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a class="active" href="/advokater/" role="button" title="Advokater gruppert etter by">Etter by</a>
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a href="/advokater/?sort=navn" role="button" title="Advokater sortert etter firmanavn">Etter firmanavn</a>
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

Recurring Issues in Article/News Pages (4 pages scanned)

[ARTICLE PAGES SUMMARY - 4 pages]
Avvik: 5 | Bestått: 0
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication (×12 across article pages)

<a class="btn btn-primary btn-block twitter" href="" target="_blank">Del på Twitter</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hjelpeside' (×4 across article pages)

<a aria-label="Gå til hjelpeside" class="open-help-noscript" href="/info/faq"></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label (×4 across article pages)

<input autoselect="" class="form-control dele-url" value="https://lovdata.no/artikkel/det_samiske_flagget_og_loven/5403"> <a class="btn btn-primary btn-block twitter" href="" target="_blank">Del på Tw
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: 'del' (×4 across article pages)

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="del" class="modal fade" id="deleModal" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"> <div class="modal-dialog"> <div class="modal-content"> <div class="modal-header"> <button a
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container (×340 across article pages)

<button aria-expanded="false" class="gliding-menu-item menuTgl">Rettskilder</button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://lovdata.no
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://lovdata.no --max-pages 18 --format html
